commands:
python3 - <<'PY'
import zipfile, xml.etree.ElementTree as ET
from pathlib import Path
ns={'a':'http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/spreadsheetml/2006/main'}
p=Path('[EXCLUDED_GENERATED_ARTIFACT]')
with zipfile.ZipFile(p) as z:
    root=ET.fromstring(z.read('xl/worksheets/sheet3.xml'))
    vals={}
    for c in root.findall('.//a:c',ns):
        r=c.attrib['r']
        v=c.find('a:v',ns)
        isel=c.find('a:is/a:t',ns)
        vals[r]=v.text if v is not None else (isel.text if isel is not None else None)
    for key in ['C5','D5','E5','F5','C6','D6','E6','F6','C7','D7','E7','F7','C8','D8','E8','F8']:
        print(key, vals.get(key))
PY

python3 - <<'PY'
import zipfile, xml.etree.ElementTree as ET
from pathlib import Path
ns={'a':'http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/spreadsheetml/2006/main'}
p=Path('[EXCLUDED_GENERATED_ARTIFACT]')
with zipfile.ZipFile(p) as z:
    root=ET.fromstring(z.read('xl/worksheets/sheet1.xml'))
    vals={}
    for c in root.findall('.//a:c',ns):
        r=c.attrib['r']
        v=c.find('a:v',ns)
        isel=c.find('a:is/a:t',ns)
        vals[r]=v.text if v is not None else (isel.text if isel is not None else None)
    for key in ['B4','E4','H4','B5','E5','H5','B6','E6','H6']:
        print(key, vals.get(key))
PY
